outcome_statement: A client completes a 5-question coaching session and receives an AI-generated content pack (LinkedIn posts, YouTube hooks, Instagram captions, email subjects) they can copy and download immediately.
pain: Clients have authority and story but can't translate it into platform-native content without a full production team.
value: One 15-minute session produces a week of authentic content in the client's own voice.
success_metrics: Client can complete all 5 questions through the UI
Content pack is generated and downloadable as plain text
failure_metrics: Session start fails with DB error
GET routes return 401 because owner_id is missing
Content pack generation returns a 502 or unparseable AI response
constraints: Text-only coaching session — no recording or video in this BP
No payment gating in this BP
BP_PRIORITY queue authority — execute after no blocking dependencies
scope_boundary: Per FOUNDER_PACKET.md — 5 Q&A → AI generation → download. No voice, no b-roll, no competitor intelligence.
unacceptable_result: Acceptance script exits 1; owner_id type error crashes session start; GET state/export routes 401 in tests
ownership: ARC emits machine twin; Builder executes; Adam owns founder usability verdict

point_model.A: Vision — Adam provides FP in development stage
point_model.B: Chair locks handoff — corridor protected; Adam done until Alpha
